events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Still Rolling
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still commanding the stage! Happy birthday to rock 'n' roll legend Mick Jagger.

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first music video.

angles.name: Video Star
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV changed the game forever. Do you remember the first music video they ever played?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Mad for It
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed British music. What's your top track from the album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival 57th anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since half a million gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. Imagine being there!

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Elvis Presley passed away on August 16, 1977, at the age of 42; he would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: King Forever
angles.copy: Remembering the King of Rock 'n' Roll, Elvis Presley, 49 years after his passing. His music lives on.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur passed away on September 13, 1996, at the age of 25, after being shot in Las Vegas; he would have been 55 this year.

angles.name: Legacy Lives
angles.copy: Thirty years since the world lost a lyrical genius. Remembering Tupac Shakur and his enduring impact on music and culture.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix passed away on September 18, 1970, at the age of 27; he would have been 84 this year.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled Jimi Hendrix, 56 years after his untimely death. His guitar wizardry redefined music forever.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: That Cover
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most famous in history.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Her voice and attitude are as powerful as ever.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The iconic Oasis frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that pure rock 'n' roll swagger.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released 55 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon released his iconic single 'Imagine' in the US on October 11, 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: Fifty-five years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine'. A timeless message that resonates just as strongly today.

events.title: The first iPod released 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple released the first-generation iPod on November 10, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Tunes
angles.copy: Remember when you could fit 1,000 songs in your pocket? The original iPod turns 25 today. A true game-changer!

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the first 007 film premiere in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! What's your favourite Bond film or theme song? Licence to thrill all day long.

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles' legendary songwriter, John Lennon.

angles.name: Remembering John
angles.copy: Remembering the visionary John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message continue to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British comedian and actor, John Cleese, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Happy 87th birthday to the legendary John Cleese! From Python to Fawlty Towers, a true master of British comedy.
